title: Evangelion episode titles
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion episode titles             Quote Post by ruboline » Mon Jan 27, 2020 6:50 pm Which of the episode titles are your favourites? Least favourites? Do you generally like the Japanese or international titles better? Which ones evoke the connected episodes the most? I'm a big fan of: The Phone That Never Rings (鳴らない、電話 "Naranai, denwa") "The Day Tokyo-3 Stood Still" SEELE, the Throne of Souls (ゼーレ、魂の座 "Zēre, tamashii no za") In sickness unto death, and... (死に至る病、そして "Shi ni itaru yamai, soshite") "Splitting of the Breast" The Choice of Life (命の選択を "Inochi no sentaku o") A Man's Battle (男の戰い "Otoko no tatakai") The Final Messenger (最後のシ者 "Saigo no shisha") "The Beginning and the End, or 'Knockin' on Heaven's Door'" "ONE MORE FINAL: I need you." and my favourite: The Beast that Shouted 'I/Love' at the Heart of the World (世界の中心でアイを叫んだけもの "Sekai no chūshin de 'ai' o sakenda kemono")

[]: Re: Evangelion episode titles             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 27, 2020 9:40 pm "Seele, tamashii no za" should probably be something more like "Throne of Seele/soul". A play on words.

chunks.content:
Article: Evangelion episode titles
[]: Evangelion episode titles             Quote Post by ruboline » Mon Jan 27, 2020 6:50 pm Which of the episode titles are your favourites? Least favourites? Do you generally like the Japanese or international titles better? Which ones evoke the connected episodes the most? I'm a big fan of: The Phone That Never Rings (鳴らない、電話 "Naranai, denwa") "The Day Tokyo-3 Stood Still" SEELE, the Throne of Souls (ゼーレ、魂の座 "Zēre, tamashii no za") In sickness unto death, and... (死に至る病、そして "Shi ni itaru yamai, soshite") "Splitting of the Breast" The Choice of Life (命の選択を "Inochi no sentaku o") A Man's Battle (男の戰い "Otoko no tatakai") The Final Messenger (最後のシ者 "Saigo no shisha") "The Beginning and the End, or 'Knockin' on Heaven's Door'" "ONE MORE FINAL: I need you." and my favourite: The Beast that Shouted 'I/Love' at the Heart of the World (世界の中心でアイを叫んだけもの "Sekai no chūshin de 'ai' o sakenda kemono")

[]: Re: Evangelion episode titles             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 27, 2020 9:40 pm "Seele, tamashii no za" should probably be something more like "Throne of Seele/soul". A play on words.
